PARAM.description: relative accuracy of the result must be a valid double
PARAM.name: relativeAccuracy

PARAM.description: absolute accuracy of the result must be a valid double
PARAM.name: absoluteAccuracy

PARAM.description: minimal number of iterations must be strictly positive
PARAM.name: minimalIterationCount

PARAM.description: maximal number of iterations must be less than or equal to SimpsonIntegrator's SIMPSON_MAX_ITERATIONS_COUNT and strictly positive
PARAM.name: maximalIterationCount
PARAM.content: maximum number of iterations (must be less than or equal to SimpsonIntegrator's SIMPSON_MAX_ITERATIONS_COUNT)

THROWS.description: if minimal number of iterations is not strictly positive
THROWS.name: NotStrictlyPositiveException
THROWS.content: if minimal number of iterations is not strictly positive

THROWS.description: if maximal number of iterations is lesser than or equal to the minimal number of iterations
THROWS.name: NumberIsTooSmallException
THROWS.content: if maximal number of iterations is lesser than or equal to the minimal number of iterations

THROWS.description: if maximal number of iterations is greater than #SIMPSON_MAX_ITERATIONS_COUNT
THROWS.name: NumberIsTooLargeException
THROWS.content: if maximal number of iterations is greater than #SIMPSON_MAX_ITERATIONS_COUNT

PARAM.description: minimal number of iterations is strictly positive
PARAM.name: minimalIterationCount

PARAM.description: maximal number of iterations must be less than or equal to SimpsonIntegrator.SIMPSON_MAX_ITERATIONS_COUNT and greater than minimal number of iterations
PARAM.name: maximalIterationCount
PARAM.content: maximum number of iterations (must be less than or equal to {#SIMPSON_MAX_ITERATIONS_COUNT})

THROWS.description: if minimal number of iterations is not strictly positive.
THROWS.name: NotStrictlyPositiveException
THROWS.content: if minimal number of iterations is not strictly positive.

THROWS.description: if maximal number of iterations is lesser than or equal to the minimal number of iterations.
THROWS.name: NumberIsTooSmallException
THROWS.content: if maximal number of iterations is lesser than or equal to the minimal number of iterations.

THROWS.description: if maximal number of iterations is greater than SIMPSON_MAX_ITERATIONS_COUNT.
THROWS.name: NumberIsTooLargeException
THROWS.content: if maximal number of iterations is greater than {@link #SIMPSON_MAX_ITERATIONS_COUNT}.
